title: Nursery Rhyme. DVII. Natural History.
content:
"What do they call you?"
        "Patchy Dolly."
        "Where were you born?"
        "In the cow's horn."
        "Where were you bred?"
        "In the cow's head."
        "Where will you die?"
        "In the cow's eye."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DVII. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
